title: ApprovalTrustedIssuersConfig
description: JSON shape of the APPROVAL_TRUSTED_ISSUERS environment variable read by the verify path inside /v1-evaluate. Keyed by issuer_id, then by kid (key id, for rotation). Each entry MUST specify the algorithm + key bytes; OPTIONAL scope fields narrow the issuer's authority to specific action types, environments, or required reviewer roles. An empty / missing scope list means 'any' for that dimension. Never wire-side: this object lives only in server config, the artifact carries only the (issuer_id, kid) tuple.

additionalProperties.description: Map of kid → key entry. The verify path looks up artifact.issuer.kid here.

alg.description: Signature algorithm. HS256 = HMAC-SHA-256 with a hex-encoded shared secret. Ed25519 = detached signature with a hex-encoded 32-byte raw public key.

key.description: Hex-encoded HS256 secret (any byte length) or Ed25519 raw public key (32 bytes / 64 hex chars). Ed25519 signatures may be hex or base64url; HS256 signatures are hex only.

allowed_action_types.description: Per-issuer scope: action_types this kid may approve. Entries match exactly OR with a trailing `.*` wildcard (e.g. `deployment.production.*` matches `deployment.production.deploy`). Empty / missing = unscoped on action types.

allowed_environments.description: Per-issuer scope: environments this kid may approve in (e.g. ['production']). Empty / missing = unscoped.

required_role.description: When set, the issuer's required_role wins over the caller's requiredRole. A misconfigured caller cannot broaden this issuer's authority.
